subcodes.first_line: O kind friend, his honor Amin, endless praise be unto that servant of the Lord and his noble sons [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار مهربان جناب امین همواره ستایش بسیار از آن بنده پروردگار و ابناء امجاد
subcodes.subjects: @Imam 'Ali, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
